test.name: TC_001 — Successful Login With Valid Credentials
test.doc: Verify that a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the inventory page.

test.name: TC_002 — Failed Login With Wrong Password
test.doc: Verify that an error message is displayed when logging in with an incorrect password.

test.name: TC_003 — Add A Product To The Cart
test.doc: Verify that a product can be added to the cart and the cart badge updates to 1.
